subject: Marnie, Galar trainer — a young woman in a pink-and-black dress with short black jacket, asymmetric pigtail hairstyle, standing in an indoor setting
description: A full-body portrait of a female trainer figure in a distinctive pink-and-black layered dress with a short black jacket. She has a pronounced asymmetric hairstyle with one side pulled into a pigtail and bangs framing her face. She stands in a slightly contrapposto pose in what appears to be an indoor location with soft, neutral-toned walls. The card frame labels her as a Trainer / Supporter. The figure's design and name on the card unambiguously identify her as Marnie, the Spikemuth gym leader from the Galar region.
foreground: young female trainer in pink-and-black dress and black jacket, asymmetric pigtail hairstyle
background: soft indoor interior with neutral walls
emotion: confident, slightly defiant posture; neutral-to-cool expression
